nasb.text: Do not listen to them; serve the king of Babylon, and live! Why should this city become a ruin?

esv.text: Do not listen to them; serve the king of Babylon and live. Why should this city become a desolation?

cnv.text: 你們不要聽從他們，只要服事巴比倫王，就可以生存。為甚麼要使這城變為廢墟呢？

ccb.text: 你们不可听信他们的话。你们要臣服于巴比伦王，以便存活。何必使这城沦为废墟呢？
